subcodes.title: Words to pilgrims, spoken on 1914-04-23
subcodes.first_line: I have often repeated that kissing the hands, the feet and kneeling and bowing are strictly forbidden in the Bahá'í Dispensation. These are old, archaic customs of the religious East
subcodes.subjects: @rejection, opposition and persecution, @Satan; the Evil One, @humility; meekness; lowliness, @pride; vanity; laying claim to inner knowledge, @human reality created in the image of God, @servitude; submission to God; repentance
